description_for_human: Secure client vault for solo CPAs and boutique accounting firms — encrypted document exchange, PBC task management, ESIGN-compliant audit trails, and automated follow-ups.
description_for_model: LedgerStash is a SaaS platform that helps solo CPAs and boutique accounting firms securely exchange documents with clients. Key features include: encrypted document vaults (AES-256), PBC (Provided By Client) task lists, per-client folders, white-label branding, Busy Season auto-reminders, ESIGN/UETA-compliant audit trails with downloadable PDF certificates, engagement letter tracking, audit-ready export packages, context-aware AI client bot, AI practice intelligence bot, two-way secure messaging, real-time upload notifications, and 10 pre-built PBC templates. Pricing: Solo Practitioner $49/mo (25 clients), Boutique Firm $149/mo (100 clients), Enterprise Vault $199/mo (unlimited). All plans include unlimited team members. 14-day free trial, no credit card required. Compliant with IRS 4557, FTC Safeguards Rule, and GLBA.
